extracted.title: Huntingdon/Station 2 South Capacity for April 16, 2026
extracted.description:
As per notice #175878, Westcoast will be allowing the following flow on T South:

Huntingdon Delivery Area Capacity

April 16, 2026: 1,614,687 GJ

Station 2 South Capacity

April 16, 2026: 1,993,147 GJ

The constraint is below Firm Contracted Capacity. Shippers can access the Constrained Locations Firm Shipper Share Report for more detailed information (Nominations>Scheduled Quantity>Constrained Locations Firm Shipper Share).

Changes in operating conditions may result in the capacity being recalled on any gas cycle.

If you have any questions, please contact the CSR hotline at (403) 699-1800.
